metadata.title: Cua hang thu cong va mau moc amigurumi
metadata.description: Nen tang song ngu an toan cho san pham thu cong va mau moc.

catalog.title: Cua hang do moc
catalog.intro: Kham pha mau PDF va san pham handmade co san tai thi truong cua ban.
catalog.emptyBody: Hay thay doi tu khoa hoac bo loc.

product.digitalWarning: Day la mau ky thuat so, khong phai san pham hoan thien
product.shippingNote: Van chuyen duoc sap xep sau khi mua
product.unavailableTitle: Khong co san tai thi truong cua ban
product.unavailableBody: San pham da duoc dang, nhung khong the mua tai thi truong dang chon.

home.title: Mau moc va qua tang len thu cong
home.intro: Nen tang song ngu am ap cho cua hang handmade phuc vu khach hang Viet Nam va quoc te.
home.localizedTitle: Ban dia hoa tu lan truy cap dau
home.localizedBody: Trang cong khai dung duong dan tieng Viet va tieng Anh ro rang, voi chuyen ngon ngu tuong duong.
home.secureTitle: Ranh gioi bao mat truoc tien
home.secureBody: Tai khoan va quan tri se dua tren kiem tra phia server va vai tro do co so du lieu quan ly.
home.studioBody: He thong hinh anh giu net thu cong vua du, de doc va dang tin cay.

auth.genericError: Yeu cau chua hoan tat. Kiem tra thong tin va thu lai.

signIn.title: Dang nhap
signIn.intro: Dung email va mat khau de vao tai khoan.

register.title: Tao tai khoan
register.intro: Tao tai khoan de xem lich su don hang va truy cap an toan sau nay.
register.successBody: Neu can xac nhan, hay dung lien ket chung toi gui de hoan tat tai khoan.

forgotPassword.title: Dat lai mat khau
forgotPassword.intro: Nhap email va chung toi se gui huong dan dat lai neu tai khoan ton tai.
forgotPassword.successBody: Neu email nay co the nhan thu tai khoan, huong dan dat lai se den som.

resetPassword.title: Chon mat khau moi
resetPassword.intro: Nhap mat khau moi sau khi mo lien ket khoi phuc hop le.
resetPassword.successBody: Mat khau cua ban da duoc cap nhat. Ban co the tiep tuc voi tai khoan.
resetPassword.invalidRecovery: Lien ket khoi phuc nay khong con hop le. Hay yeu cau lien ket dat lai mat khau moi.

account.title: Tai khoan
account.intro: Ranh gioi tai khoan Phase 1 dang hoat dong.

accessDenied.heading: Khong the mo don hang nay
accessDenied.body: Lien ket khong hop le, da het han hoac ban khong co quyen truy cap.

fulfillment.lockedBody: File PDF va xu ly giao hang chi bat dau sau khi toan bo don hang duoc xac nhan da thanh toan.
fulfillment.eligibleBody: Thanh toan da duoc xac nhan. Don hang da du dieu kien cho buoc xu ly tiep theo.

awaiting_payment.heading: Dang cho thanh toan
awaiting_payment.body: Kiem tra dung tong tien va hoan tat thanh toan truoc han giu hang.

verifying_payment.heading: Dang xac minh thanh toan
verifying_payment.body: PayPal da dua ban tro lai cua hang. Chung toi dang xac minh thanh toan truoc khi cap nhat don hang.

paid.heading: Da thanh toan
paid.body: Thanh toan cho toan bo don hang da duoc xac nhan.

failed.heading: Thanh toan khong thanh cong
failed.body: Don hang nay khong the thu lai. Hay tao don moi de tinh lai gia va hang ton hien tai.

cancelled.heading: Thanh toan da huy
cancelled.body: Thanh toan da huy va san pham khong con duoc giu cho don hang nay.

rejected.heading: Chuyen khoan khong duoc chap nhan
rejected.body: Bang chung thanh toan khong duoc chap nhan. Hay tao don moi neu ban van muon mua.

expired.heading: Da het han thanh toan
expired.body: Han giu hang da qua va san pham khong con duoc giu cho don hang nay.

partially_refunded.heading: Da hoan tien mot phan
partially_refunded.body: Don hang co ghi nhan hoan tien mot phan. Khong co hanh dong moi cho khach tai day.

refunded.heading: Da hoan tien
refunded.body: Don hang da duoc hoan tien. Khong co hanh dong moi cho khach tai day.

review_required.heading: Dang kiem tra thanh toan
review_required.body: Chung toi dang xem lai thong tin thanh toan da xac minh truoc khi doi trang thai don hang.

paypal.unavailable: PayPal hien khong kha dung cho don hang nay.
paypal.amountContext: Ban se thanh toan {amount} qua PayPal.

footer.copyright: Nen tang studio handmade tam thoi
